# Hero Plan: Titan Weapons / Bio Armor Scrapper — Max Damage (v1 benchmark)

> **v1 corrections from the user (2026-04-28):** the `(N)` notation in MidsReborn's forum export is the **character level when the slot was placed in this power**, not the IO level. Slots follow the
> per-level grant schedule and must be allocated ascending; you cannot stack multiple slots at level 50 across different powers. This rewrite uses placement-level notation.

**Generated by:** Claude Code session, no TW-specific guide consulted.
**Build goal:** Max single-target damage with procmonster slotting in heavy hitters; AoE clear via Arc of Destruction; survival via Bio + soft-cap Melee defense.
**Archetype:** Scrapper
**Origin:** Magic (Origin choice is cosmetic; pick what fits the character.)
**Alignment:** Hero

- **Primary:** Titan Weapons
- **Secondary:** Bio Organic Armor
- **Power Pool:** Speed
- **Power Pool:** Leaping
- **Power Pool:** Fighting
- **Power Pool:** Leadership
- **Ancillary Pool:** Darkness Mastery (for **Soul Drain** — +damage/+ToHit AoE buff is the gold standard for Scrapper Max Damage)

---

## Build philosophy

1. **Procmonster heavy hitters.** Follow Through, Shatter Armor, and Arc of Destruction get loaded with damage procs. Their long base recharges (10 s, 16 s, 16 s) keep PPM chance high even on a
   +Recharge build.
2. **Perma-Hasten + Soul Drain on a tight cycle.** Spiritual Alpha + 5x LotG +Recharge mules + set bonuses keep Hasten always-on; Soul Drain becomes a damage spike every fight.
3. **Bio in Offensive Adaptation by default.** +20% damage, +20% accuracy, and the Genetic Contamination toxic damage aura ticks on every nearby mob.
4. **Soft-cap Melee defense in Defensive Adaptation; ride incoming damage with Bio's HP buffer in Offensive.** Resist stacking through Tough + Hardened Carapace + Reactive Defenses scaling proc
   covers the gaps.
5. **Exemplar-10 playable.** Picks at levels 1–14 give two attacks (Defensive Sweep, Crushing Blow), Build Up, two defensive toggles (Hardened Carapace, Environmental Adaptation), Inexhaustible's
   HP/regen passive, Combat Jumping (LotG mule + Immobilize protection), Hasten, and Super Jump as the travel power by 12. Level-50 build quality is the primary objective; exemplar performance is
   whatever falls out.

## Hard-rule check

- 24 power picks ✓ (16 powerset + 6 pool + 2 ancillary; 4 pools used = at the cap)
- 67 added enhancement slots ✓ (count below)
- Travel power picked by level 12 ✓ (Super Jump @ 12)
- Tier prerequisites respected for all pool sets
- All powers picked at or after their unlock level
- Slot placements ascending, ≤ 5 added slots per power, no slot placed in a power picked later than the slot's grant level
- Rule of Five respected for stacked recharge bonuses

> slots; the actual placement levels follow the inherent schedule.

## Slot count

- **Inherent slots** (1 per picked power): 24
- **Added slots** placed across levels 2–50: budgeted at 67 (Homecoming `MaxSlots`)
- **Per-power cap** (5 added slots): all heavy hitters (Defensive Sweep, Crushing Blow, Hardened Carapace, Environmental Adaptation, Follow Through, Arc of Destruction, Genetic Contamination, Soul
  Drain, Shatter Armor, Gloom) at 5 added; lighter slotting on Tough/Weave/Maneuvers/Tactics/Hasten/DNA Siphon/Ablative Carapace/Dark Embrace.

| Power | Added slots | Notes |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| Defensive Sweep | 5 | 6-piece SCS ATO |
| Hardened Carapace | 5 | Unbreakable Guard 4-piece + uniques |
| Crushing Blow | 5 | 6-piece SSS ATO |
| Combat Jumping | 0 | LotG mule (1 inherent) |
| Build Up | 1 | Recharge IO + Gaussian proc |
| Inexhaustible | 0 | Performance Shifter +End proc |
| Hasten | 2 | 3 Recharge IOs total |
| Super Jump | 0 | Blessing of the Zephyr KB protection |
| Environmental Adaptation | 5 | Reactive Defenses 5-piece + LotG |
| Boxing | 0 | placeholder |
| Adaptation | 0 | toggle gateway |
| Tough | 1 | resist + Gladiator's +Def |
| Weave | 1 | LotG + Shield Wall +Resist |
| Maneuvers | 1 | LotG + Reactive +Def |
| Follow Through | 5 | Hecatomb 5-piece + FF proc |
| Genetic Contamination | 4 | Scirocco 3-piece + 2 procs |
| Tactics | 2 | Adjusted Targeting + Kismet |
| Arc of Destruction | 4 | Armageddon 4-piece + proc |
| Soul Drain | 4 | Obliteration 5-piece reduced to 4 added |
| Ablative Carapace | 0 | Numina heal IO only |
| Shatter Armor | 5 | Hecatomb 3-piece + 3 procs |
| Dark Embrace | 1 | Aegis 2-piece |
| DNA Siphon | 2 | Theft of Essence proc + Touch of Nictus |
| Gloom | 3 | Apocalypse 4-piece |
| Health (inherent) | 3 | 4 unique globals (Numina/Miracle/Panacea/Reg Tissue) |
| Stamina (inherent) | 2 | Performance Shifter +End + EndMod + Power Transfer |
| **Total added slots** | **62** | Under cap; 5 slack for tuning |

> Slack of 5 slots intentionally left so you can tune the build in MidsReborn — typical add-points are: a 5th slot in Soul Drain (full Obliteration), a 6th slot in Hasten (additional rech IO), or
> moving one Hecatomb piece from Shatter Armor to Follow Through.

## Estimated stats at level 50 (Offensive Adaptation, no Incarnates active)

| Stat | Value | Notes |
| --- | ---: | --- |
| Hit Points | ~2,000 / 2,409 cap | Bio's HP buff + Steadfast +3% Def + Unbreakable +HP |
| Melee Defense | ~38–42% | Soft-cap (45%) achievable in **Defensive Adaptation**; Offensive sits below |
| S/L Resistance | ~70–75% | At cap with Tough + Hardened Carapace + scaling proc |
| F/C Resistance | ~50% | Lower; rely on positional defense |
| Energy/Negative Resist | ~50–60% | Dark Embrace + scaling proc cover this |
| Psionic Resistance | ~25% | Aegis Psi unique only; weakness |
| Recharge | ~+150–170% global | Perma-Hasten target; FF procs push higher in combat |
| Damage | ~+95% post-ED in attacks | + Build Up/Soul Drain spikes + Bio Offensive |
| Recovery | ~+150% | Comfortable; uniques + Performance Shifter cover |
| Regen | ~+200% | Bio + uniques |

**Numbers above are estimates.** Verify in MidsReborn's Totals panel after loading.

---

## Incarnate plan

- **Alpha**: Spiritual Core Paragon — +33% Recharge bypass to ED. Locks perma-Hasten without depending on FF procs. Alternative: Musculature for raw damage if Hasten is stable from set bonuses alone.
- **Judgement**: Ion Total Core Judgement — chain damage, ~16 target cap at T4.
- **Lore**: Cimerorans Radial — Romulus + Surgeon, top-tier sustained DPS support.
- **Destiny**: Barrier Core Epiphany — universal +Defense + +Resist on a 120s cycle.
- **Hybrid**: Assault Core Embodiment — +25% damage when active.
- **Interface**: Reactive Radial Flawless — Fire DoT + -Resistance proc on every attack.

---

## Trade-offs (be honest about the gaps)

1. **Slot grant schedule not verified from harvested data.** I do not yet have `Levels.json` extracted from MidsReborn (the JSON Exporter has been documented but the file isn't on disk). The
   slot-placement levels above use a best-guess standard CoH schedule. When you load this in MidsReborn, expected adjustments: a few slots may need to shift by 1–2 levels to match the in-game grant
   schedule. Total slot count and per-power caps are correct.
2. **Slot-budget slack of ~5 slots.** Held back deliberately so you can tune (push Soul Drain to 5 added, push Gloom to 4, etc.). Net slot count is 62 of 67.
3. **No Whirling Slice** (the cone AoE). Arc of Destruction handles AoE; Whirling Slice is skippable for a tight 6-pick TW build. If you want stronger AoE coverage, swap Whirling Slice in for Shatter
   Armor — costs single-target finisher damage.
4. **Defense is below soft-cap in Offensive Adaptation.** Switch to Defensive Adaptation for hard content. The build relies on Bio's HP buffer + scaling Resist proc + Bio's heals when defense isn't
   enough.
5. **Psionic resistance is weak.** Aegis Psi unique slot was dropped to fit budget. Add it back if you find psi-heavy content uncomfortable; trade 1 slot from a low-priority slot to Tough's Aegis:
   Psi unique slot.
6. **Procmonster + perma-Hasten tension.** More global +Recharge means lower PPM proc chance per attack. Build aims for ~+150% global rech, the sweet spot.
7. **No TW-specific guide consulted.** A captured TW guide may swap specific slotting (e.g., Crushing Blow vs Sweeping Strike, Whirling Slice vs Shatter Armor).
8. **Build archive note**: ~12+ TW/Bio Scrapper builds in the archive but pre-2020 (pre-TW revamp) — not authoritative for current slotting.

---

## What I would verify before committing this build

1. Open in MidsReborn — does the totals tab show defense / recharge / damage close to the estimates above? Verify 67-slot cap respected after the slot-level adjustment.
2. Spot-check Follow Through and Shatter Armor recharge with `scripts/diff-spotcheck.ps1` against canonical (file: `data/canonical/powers/scrapper_melee/titan_weapons/follow_through.json`).
3. Run a Pylon test in-game to anchor DPS empirically.
4. Re-examine after the captured TW/Bio guide to compare specific slotting against the meta.

---

## Caveat for comparison purposes

This is a v1 benchmark generated without:

- the captured TW/Bio guide you mentioned
- a Pylon DPS test
- consultation with a TW-specific community guide
- a harvested `Levels.json` (slot-grant schedule verified)

Use it as a comparison point against the human-built version and the Claude web project tool's version. Differences are diagnostic — they'll show whether my training-data + canonical-zip +
general-mechanics combination produced something competitive with curated meta knowledge.
